raw_consumer_statement:
I am disputing an outstanding balance of {$1200.00} on my Citi XXXX credit card related to medical financing charges from XXXX XXXX XXXX ( XXXX ) for Invisalign treatment. 

The original financing agreement with XXXX was for {$4500.00}. The merchant continued charging beyond the agreed term and total amount. When the overbilling became clear, I reversed XXXX charges through Citi. 

In XXXX, I closed my Citi XXXX credit card and paid the account in full, with a XXXX balance at the time of closure. After the account was closed and fully paid, Citi subsequently re-posted XXXX additional monthly charges from XXXX XXXX XXXX. 

I immediately provided Citi with proof that I had already paid the legitimate remaining balance directly to the merchant, along with a detailed reconciliation of charges demonstrating that the total amount billed exceeded the agreed {$4500.00}. 

Despite this documentation, Citi closed multiple billing dispute cases ( including XXXX, XXXX, XXXX, and XXXX ) and instructed me to resolve the matter directly with the merchant. The merchant, however, claims it has not been paid twice but is unable to reconcile the inflated balance, which appears to be driven largely by improper interest and fees. 

Since XXXX, Citi has failed to resolve the dispute and has continued to assess interest and report an outstanding balance on a closed account, despite the balance being actively disputed and substantively settled. These continued charges and reporting have caused ongoing financial harm and are negatively impacting my credit profile.
